creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Mon, 16 Dec 2013 16:05:25 +0100
Niclas Zeising <zeising@freebsd.org> wrote:

> I just added stage support to x11/xdm.  Can you test if this is still
> a problem after that?
> Regards!


Checked that on FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT (most recent, amd64) with
today's updates on X11. I have no problems, so far. x11/xdm installs as
expected.

Regards,
Oliver
